mappings.notes: Invokes Remotion CLI render to dist/im-just-a-build.mp4; requires Node, npm, FFmpeg on PATH.
Validates cwd, assets, toolchain, lint, compositions, and no Math.random under src/.
RENDER_REPORT, RENDER_EVIDENCE.json, hashes, environment and command logs from host pass.
Seeded jitter; no Math.random or wall-clock entropy in composition logic.
Documents format, runtime requirements, render/verification/packaging/proxy, and distinguishes source from release deliverables.
Writes im-just-a-build-source.zip; excludes node_modules and dist (legacy name im-just-a-build-crsp-package.zip).
Writes im-just-a-build-release.zip with MP4, verification/*.sha256, RENDER_REPORT, README, LICENSE; records RELEASE_ZIP_SHA256.txt.
Release packaging pointer to repository charter; not a standalone license regime.
